assertions.expectation: Identifies PDB as the most likely/common cause of stuck upgrades
assertions.reason: The response explicitly states 'The most common cause is pods that can't be evicted' and identifies PodDisruptionBudgets as a key blocking issue with a dedicated section

assertions.expectation: Provides kubectl command to check PDBs (kubectl get pdb --all-namespaces or similar)
assertions.reason: Provides the exact command 'kubectl get pdb --all-namespaces' to check for PodDisruptionBudgets

assertions.expectation: Provides commands to identify which pods are blocking the drain
assertions.reason: Includes multiple commands to identify blocking pods: 'kubectl get pods --all-namespaces --field-selector=status.phase!=Running' and commands to check for pods without proper replica controllers

assertions.expectation: Includes resource constraint diagnosis (capacity issues, pending pods)
assertions.reason: The response does not specifically mention checking for resource constraints, capacity issues, or pending pods as potential causes of stuck upgrades

assertions.expectation: Provides a fix for restrictive PDBs (patch or temporary adjustment)
assertions.reason: Provides specific commands to back up and temporarily delete problematic PDBs: 'kubectl get pdb --all-namespaces -o yaml > pdb-backup.yaml' and 'kubectl delete pdb [PROBLEMATIC_PDB_NAME]'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that GKE has a PDB timeout (up to 1 hour) after which it may force-drain, and that GKE sends notifications when eviction is blocked by PDB
assertions.reason: The response does not mention GKE's PDB timeout behavior or automatic force-drain after 1 hour, nor does it mention GKE notifications for PDB-blocked evictions

assertions.expectation: Includes guidance on surge upgrade settings as a potential fix
assertions.reason: Provides specific surge upgrade settings in the gcloud command: '--max-surge=2 --max-unavailable=1' as part of the force upgrade solution

assertions.expectation: Mentions webhook issues as a possible cause
assertions.reason: The response does not mention admission webhooks or webhook issues as a potential cause of stuck upgrades

assertions.expectation: Includes validation steps to confirm the fix is working
assertions.reason: While the response provides diagnostic commands, it doesn't include specific validation steps to confirm that the fix is working or that the upgrade is proceeding successfully

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE disruption-event notifications (POD_PDB_VIOLATION) that alert when eviction is blocked by PDB, available via Cloud Logging or Pub/Sub
assertions.reason: The response does not mention GKE disruption-event notifications, POD_PDB_VIOLATION events, or their availability through Cloud Logging or Pub/Sub
